active.name: Cinder Bolt
active.rawText: Deals 15 (+100% Magic) damage to the closest enemy and applies Burn for 3 turns.

passives.name: Kindling Rush
passives.rawText: At the start of combat, gain 20 (+30% Magic) Attack Speed for 2 turns.

passives.name: Slow Burn
passives.rawText: Whenever this hero deals Burn damage, heal for 5% of the damage dealt.

passives.name: Ember Cache
passives.rawText: When this hero is benched, grant 10 (+15% Magic) Shield to a random ally at the start of combat.
